gate: nix flake check PASS (clippy-as-law, tests, taplo, deny, audit, fuzz)
summary: Single high-value seam win (iter1): collapsed repeated get_sizage() lookup (6x -> 1x), inlined frame_size_of to drop its redundant re-parse, and replaced per-decode PAD.repeat(xs) String allocation with a byte check. No further SAFE primary-improving change exists: strum FromStr rewrite risks 110-variant mapping divergence; base64 engine swap is closed by #29; temp/buf Vec allocs already proven non-bottleneck by #29. Decode for fixed codes is codec-dominated after this win.
